positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit sitting among giant, glowing mushrooms and floating crystalline elements. The fox has an elegant, fluffy silhouette with flowing tails and is gazing contentedly at the viewer. The scene is dominated by deep indigo, ethereal lavender, and vibrant cyan accents, contrasted with bioluminescent gold accents emanating from the fungi and crystals. The composition is centrally focused, ensuring the fox spirit is the main subject against a magical, starry void. Studio Ghibli mixed with Japanese woodblock print aesthetics (Ukiyo-e), high detail, clean linework, perfect for direct apparel printing, vector art feel, deep depth of field, cinematic lighting, rule of thirds.
negative: blurry, artifact, low detail, noise, watermarks, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, trademark
